description: Product Description Rysons Corn Pads Soft Protector Rings 24 Pads Ideal for relieving painful shoe pressure and friction whilst cushioning corns, calluses and bunions Made from a soft cushioning material Effectively offers instant pain relief from painful corns Benefits of Rysons Corn Pads Soft Protector Rings Instant pain relief Effectively cushion corns and bunions from pressure and knocks when moving. They are ideal for use day-to-day, whilst on-the-go, exercising etc. Relieve painful shoe pressure Great for relieving painful shoe pressure & friction on painful calluses on toes & feet! 24 Pads With a generous supply of 24, these self-adhesive corn pads can be used all day then disposed of at the end of the day! Super easy to use 1) Remove the backing and place the hole directly over the affected area 2) Press down gently on the pad 3) Apply a new cushion daily for best results

specifications_table.Benefits: These corn pads relieve shoe pressure and friction while cushioning corns and bunions.
